'''âs-y-p''' ('''kasayap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neuter|neuter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neuter|neuter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-y-p
|-
! Lemma
| kasayap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisayap|thisayap]] || [[word:jisayap|jisayap]] || [[word:shisayap|shisayap]] || [[word:kisayap|kisayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusayap|thuthusayap]] || [[word:jujusayap|jujusayap]] || [[word:shushusayap|shushusayap]] || [[word:kukusayap|kukusayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusayap|thusayap]] || [[word:jusayap|jusayap]] || [[word:shusayap|shusayap]] || [[word:kusayap|kusayap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusayap|thusayap]] || [[word:jusayap|jusayap]] || [[word:shusayap|shusayap]] || [[word:kusayap|kusayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesayap|thesayap]] || [[word:jesayap|jesayap]] || [[word:shesayap|shesayap]] || [[word:kesayap|kesayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosayap|thothosayap]] || [[word:jojosayap|jojosayap]] || [[word:shoshosayap|shoshosayap]] || [[word:kokosayap|kokosayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosayap|thosayap]] || [[word:josayap|josayap]] || [[word:shosayap|shosayap]] || [[word:kosayap|kosayap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosayap|thosayap]] || [[word:josayap|josayap]] || [[word:shosayap|shosayap]] || [[word:kosayap|kosayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsayap|thĂŠsayap]] || [[word:jĂŠsayap|jĂŠsayap]] || [[word:shĂŠsayap|shĂŠsayap]] || [[word:kĂŠsayap|kĂŠsayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasayap|thathasayap]] || [[word:jajasayap|jajasayap]] || [[word:shashasayap|shashasayap]] || [[word:kakasayap|kakasayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasayap|thasayap]] || [[word:jasayap|jasayap]] || [[word:shasayap|shasayap]] || [[word:kasayap|kasayap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasayap|thasayap]] || [[word:jasayap|jasayap]] || [[word:shasayap|shasayap]] || [[word:kasayap|kasayap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasayap|shasayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasayap|goshasayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasayap|gokishasayap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasayapnĂŒ|shasayapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasayapnknĂŒ|goshasayapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayapnĂŒ|gokishasayapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasayapshĂ«|shasayapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasayapnkshĂ«|goshasayapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasayapshĂ«|gokishasayapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayapro|shasayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayapnkro|goshasayapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayapro|gokishasayapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayapmu|shasayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayapnkmu|goshasayapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayapmu|gokishasayapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasayapsher|shasayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasayapnksher|goshasayapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasayapsher|gokishasayapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasayapng|shasayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasayapnkng|goshasayapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasayapng|gokishasayapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasayapya|shasayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasayapnkya|goshasayapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasayapya|gokishasayapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasayapyam|shasayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasayapnkyam|goshasayapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasayapyam|gokishasayapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayapnĂŒshĂ«|shasayapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasayapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasayapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayapnĂŒro|shasayapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayapnknĂŒro|goshasayapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayapnĂŒro|gokishasayapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayapnĂŒmu|shasayapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayapnknĂŒmu|goshasayapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayapnĂŒmu|gokishasayapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayapshĂ«nĂŒ|shasayapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasayapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasayapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayapshĂ«ro|shasayapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayapnkshĂ«ro|goshasayapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayapshĂ«ro|gokishasayapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayapshĂ«mu|shasayapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayapnkshĂ«mu|goshasayapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayapshĂ«mu|gokishasayapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayapronĂŒ|shasayapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayapnkronĂŒ|goshasayapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayapronĂŒ|gokishasayapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayaproshĂ«|shasayaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayapnkroshĂ«|goshasayapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayaproshĂ«|gokishasayaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasayapromu|shasayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasayapnkromu|goshasayapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasayapromu|gokishasayapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasayapmunĂŒ|shasayapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasayapnkmunĂŒ|goshasayapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasayapmunĂŒ|gokishasayapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasayapmushĂ«|shasayapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasayapnkmushĂ«|goshasayapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasayapmushĂ«|gokishasayapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasayapmuro|shasayapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasayapnkmuro|goshasayapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasayapmuro|gokishasayapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
